prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body portrait of Persephone Moonflower, a young man with extremely high attractiveness, intelligence, stamina, and charm, standing centered on a pure white background. Impressionist oil painting style with rich light and shadow variations and visible brushstrokes.

He has a slender, elegant build and an ethereal, dreamlike aura. His face is exquisitely handsome with delicate, refined features: high cheekbones, a straight nose, and a well-defined jawline. His skin is pale and flawless. His deep violet eyes are large, expressive, and hold a gentle, introspective wisdom. He wears a soft, knowing smile. His long, silver-white hair flows freely down his back and around his shoulders, appearing soft and luminous.

He is barefoot. He wears a long, flowing white lace gown that drapes elegantly over his form, adorned with delicate details and sheer layers. A crescent moon-shaped earring adorns one ear. A delicate starry bracelet encircles his wrist. Several long, silky ribbons are intertwined in his hair and trail from his attire, adding to the sense of graceful movement and poetic beauty.

The overall atmosphere is dreamy, beautiful, and finely detailed, fitting the poetic, memory-woven world of "Persephone's Carousel of Memories". The scene is bathed in a soft, gentle glow. No text, no symbols, no words., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
